phrases.intent_en: Ask which seats have the best sightlines
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿qué asientos tienen la mejor visión?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, keh ah-SYEHN-tohs TYEH-nen lah meh-HOR bee-see-OHN?

likely_response.local: Las primeras filas centrales tienen mejor vista.
likely_response.pronunciation: LAHS pree-MEH-rahs FEE-lahs thehnt-RAH-lehs tee-EH-nehn meh-HOHR BEE-stah
likely_response.translation_en: Front center rows have better view.

responses.english: Front center rows have better view.
responses.phonetic: LAHS pree-MEH-rahs FEE-lahs thehnt-RAH-lehs tee-EH-nehn meh-HOHR BEE-stah
responses.french: Las primeras filas centrales tienen mejor vista.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the show entrance is
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde está la entrada del espectáculo?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nos DEE-as, DON-deh es-TAH la en-TRAH-dah del es-pek-TAH-koo-loh?

likely_response.local: Por la puerta principal, al fondo, derecha.
likely_response.pronunciation: POHR LAH poo-EHR-tah preen-thee-PAHL AHL FOHN-doh deh-REHTH-ah
likely_response.translation_en: Through the main door, at the back, right.

responses.english: Through the main door, at the back, right.
responses.phonetic: POHR LAH poo-EHR-tah preen-thee-PAHL AHL FOHN-doh deh-REHTH-ah
responses.french: Por la puerta principal, al fondo, derecha.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the photography policy is posted
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde veo la norma de fotos?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, ¿DOHN-deh VEH-oh lah NOR-mah deh FOH-tohs?

likely_response.local: En la pared, al lado de la entrada.
likely_response.pronunciation: EHN LAH pah-REHD AHL LAH-doh DEH LAH ehnt-RAH-dah
likely_response.translation_en: On the wall, next to the entrance.

responses.english: On the wall, next to the entrance.
responses.phonetic: EHN LAH pah-REHD AHL LAH-doh DEH LAH ehnt-RAH-dah
responses.french: En la pared, al lado de la entrada.

phrases.intent_en: Ask how to select seating when booking
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿cómo elijo asiento al reservar online?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, KOH-moh eh-LYOH ah-SYEHN-toh ahl reh-ser-BAHR ohn-LEEN

likely_response.local: Eliga la zona en el mapa durante la compra.
likely_response.pronunciation: eh-LEE-gah LAH THOH-nah EHN EHL MAH-pah doo-RAHN-teh LAH KOHMP-rah
likely_response.translation_en: Select the zone on the map during purchase.

responses.english: Select the zone on the map during purchase.
responses.phonetic: eh-LEE-gah LAH THOH-nah EHN EHL MAH-pah doo-RAHN-teh LAH KOHMP-rah
responses.french: Eliga la zona en el mapa durante la compra.
